title: Auditing the public clinical-trials record: a registry-integrity atlas — processed summary data and figures
description: Processed aggregate summaries and publication figures underlying the Synthesis Research Article 'Auditing the public clinical-trials record: a registry-integrity atlas of registration, reporting and completion gaps' (Andrew Woo, 2026). Source: ClinicalTrials.gov API v2 full-registry snapshot of 29 March 2026 (578,109 studies). The raw snapshot was not retained; on an independent snapshot 14 days later, approximately 24 of 26 headline figures reproduced within 0.3 percentage points. Every value is traceable to the article text. CC BY 4.0.

creators.name: Woo, Andrew
creators.affiliation: St George's, University of London, London, UK
